name: Constant Interest Rate Accrual Election

eligibility.description: Available to holders of market discount bonds; often results in slower discount accrual and deferred ordinary income recognition compared to ratable accrual.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to accrue market discount using a constant interest rate method instead of the default ratable (linear) accrual method.
